## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services to AppSignal, a potential customer seeking to scale their content strategy and SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AppSignal needs to scale content production beyond their current Ruby/Node.js focus, targeting observability topics and competitor comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by a 12-month growth execution phase, with AI-powered workflows and expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Mike (AppSignal) is interested but price-sensitive; a follow-up demo with Marcel (GrowthX CEO) is scheduled to discuss ROI and developer tool case studies](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)

## Topics

### AppSignal's Content Challenges

  - [Current content focuses on programming languages (Ruby, Node.js, Python) but lacks strategy](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Need to expand into observability topics, competitor comparisons, and additional supported technologies](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Existing content drives traffic but has low conversion to product signups](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Limited by current human-only authoring process and personnel issues](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [Two-phase approach: 8-week strategy sprint followed by 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows with expert oversight (e.g., former TechCrunch editor-in-chief)](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Flexible content types: blogs, website sections, product catalogs, interactive demos](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Creation of detailed artifacts (personas, company context) to inform AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [Minimum of \~10 articles per week during execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)

### Case Studies and Examples

  - [Abnormal Security: 200+ pages published](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [Ramp: 700+ pages, including vendor catalog](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Augment Code: Rapid creation of experimental microsite, driving significant organic traffic growth (5-6K to skyrocketing)](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)

### Pricing and ROI Discussion

  - [Strategy sprint: $20K fixed fee (one-time)](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Growth execution: 12-month commitment, pricing to be discussed further](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Mike views the strategy sprint as an alternative to hiring a product marketer for 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [ROI and developer tool space results to be key focus of follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to schedule follow-up meeting with Mike and Marcel (GrowthX CEO) for Wednesday after 12pm Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [GrowthX to send additional resources to Mike](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting to include more detailed pricing discussion, timeline, ROI projections, and product demo](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Potential setup of Slack channel for easier communication](https://fathom.video/share/axT3zeM8tAdprsKc6FU978_BVRzWPe5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
